_publications._publicationTitle: Stepwise crosstalk between aberrant Nf1, Tp53 and Rb signalling pathways induces gliomagenesis in zebrafish.

_contextSnippet: genes recognized in the proneural, proliferative, and mesenchymal subgroups were significantly enriched in our gene sets, which were also altered among the expression signatures in our HC1–3 zebrafish subgroups
details: Successfully identified significant enrichment of proneural, proliferative, and mesenchymal subgroups in zebrafish gliomas that matched human glioma signatures
